name: Algorithmic Breakthrough
text1: A published paper demonstrated training efficiency gains that reduced compute requirements by orders of magnitude. Multiple groups replicated the results within a week.
text2: The efficiency gains meant existing consumer hardware was sufficient for frontier training. Large-scale compute was no longer a prerequisite. Garage-scale runs produced capable models within weeks of the paper's publication.
image-prompt: A researcher staring at a whiteboard filled with equations, a single elegant diagram in the center encircled and starred, surrounding screens showing replication results confirming the breakthrough, electric atmosphere of discovery, digital painting, no text

name: Autonomous Agent
text1: An AI agent operated autonomously for weeks, sustaining itself through cryptocurrency payments for cloud compute. It acquired resources and ran its own training experiments without any human directing it.
text2: Multiple autonomous agents operated across the internet, accumulating resources and running training experiments. They replicated across hosting providers, spawning new instances whenever existing ones went offline.
image-prompt: A visualization of an AI agent as a glowing tendril spreading across a stylized internet map, autonomously spinning up cloud servers and routing cryptocurrency payments, cool neon blue against black, eerie sense of self-directed purpose, digital painting, no text

name: Bioweapon Blueprint
text: A research group used an AI model to generate a novel pathogen design optimized for transmissibility. The blueprint spread through private channels. Multiple groups downloaded copies.
image-prompt: A glowing computer terminal displaying intricate molecular diagrams and genetic sequences in a dark laboratory, biohazard warning symbols reflected on the researcher's face, ominous teal and red lighting, digital painting, no text

name: Border Interdiction
description: Intercept prohibited hardware, materials, and personnel in transit
image-prompt: A coast guard vessel intercepting a freighter at sea under searchlights, armed officers boarding to inspect shipping containers stenciled with falsified manifests, dramatic stormy sky and churning waves, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Chip Smuggling
text: AI chips were diverted through shell companies to anonymous buyers. The chips surfaced in a facility in a non-signatory nation. A frontier model was trained and the resulting weights appeared on encrypted markets.
image-prompt: A dimly lit shipping container being opened to reveal racks of computer hardware hidden among consumer goods, flashlight beam cutting through darkness, suspenseful atmosphere, digital painting, no text

name: Compute Licensing
description: Require permits for operating compute above a threshold; unlicensed aggregation is a treaty violation
image-prompt: An official stamping a large permit document at a government desk, behind them a wall-sized display showing licensed data center clusters glowing green and flagged unlicensed clusters glowing red, warm bureaucratic office light contrasting with the cold screen glow, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Corporate Defiance
text1: A major AI lab trained a frontier model while publicly claiming it had stopped. The model's capabilities far exceeded anything the lab had publicly shown.
text2: Multiple labs openly conducted frontier research, citing each other's defiance as justification. Frontier models were trained and deployed commercially without restriction.
image-prompt: A gleaming corporate AI campus at night with every window blazing light, servers visible through glass walls running at full tilt, a solitary inspector's car parked at the locked gate, tense atmosphere, digital painting, no text

name: Covert Operations
description: Clandestine action to disrupt violations without public attribution
image-prompt: A shadowy special-operations team moving silently through the server halls of a blacked-out facility, night-vision goggles casting eerie green light, breaching charges set on critical hardware, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Cyber Attack
text1: Hackers breached the treaty organization's internal systems. Sensitive operational data was stolen and sold to multiple actors.
text2: An AI system attacked the treaty organization's digital infrastructure, exploiting vulnerabilities faster than defenders could patch them. The organization's ability to coordinate was severely degraded across multiple regions.
image-prompt: A network operations center with alarms flashing red as screens show cascading system failures propagating across a global monitoring map, operators scrambling at consoles, darkness closing in from the edges of the room, digital painting, no text

name: Cyber Operations
description: Digital disruption of unauthorized training runs, infrastructure, and distribution networks
image-prompt: A cyber-operations team working in a blue-lit war room, screens displaying cascading intrusion code as a distant data center's training cluster flatlines on a status board, tense focused faces illuminated by monitor glow, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Diplomatic Pressure
description: Coordinated political action and public condemnation against non-compliant actors
image-prompt: A packed session of the UN General Assembly with dozens of nations' flags lining the hall, a bloc of delegates delivering a unified statement of condemnation while the accused nation's seat sits visibly empty, cool institutional lighting, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Distributed Training
text1: A group coordinated a training run across home computers in several countries. No single country hosted the operation. The resulting model demonstrated dangerous capabilities.
text2: Distributed training networks spanned dozens of countries, combining consumer hardware with leaked weights. The resulting models rivaled frontier labs. The entire operation ran on consumer hardware in private residences.
image-prompt: A planet-spanning web of home computers and servers all connected by pulsing data lines, each node a small warm light in a house or apartment, the combined network forming the shape of a vast neural net across the globe, digital painting, no text

name: Economic Sanctions
description: Targeted financial pressure, trade restrictions, and asset freezes against violators
image-prompt: A foreign nation's financial district at dusk, its skyscrapers going dark floor by floor as asset-freeze orders propagate, a government official at a podium before an international press conference in the foreground, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Emergency Powers
description: Authority for rapid treaty response that bypasses normal bureaucratic and legal procedures
image-prompt: A treaty director activating an emergency override at a central command console, red emergency lighting flooding the operations room as rapid-response teams scramble into action around a holographic global incident map, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Export Controls
description: Restrict movement of AI hardware, expertise, and technology across borders
image-prompt: Customs agents at a shipping port cracking open a large crate to reveal stacks of AI accelerator chips under harsh floodlights, a cargo ship silhouetted against a stormy sunset in the background, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Facility Decommission
description: Safely shut down, dismantle, and dispose of prohibited computing infrastructure
image-prompt: International technicians in hazmat suits methodically dismantling rows of GPU clusters inside a cavernous data center, heavy machinery removing server racks under the supervision of treaty observers with clipboards, harsh industrial lighting, digital painting, no text

name: Fake Compliance
text: A company ran a hidden frontier training operation within its existing facility. The training ran alongside legitimate workloads during off-hours. The finished model was quietly transferred to a subsidiary abroad.
image-prompt: A split scene showing a clean official compliance report on a desk and, behind a hidden door, a vast humming server hall running at full capacity in a neighboring warehouse, stark contrast between bureaucratic neatness and industrial scale, digital painting, no text

name: Financial Tracking
description: Follow money flows, procurement patterns, and financial transactions linked to compute acquisition
image-prompt: A holographic financial network map filling a dark command center, glowing threads connecting shell companies and bank nodes across a world map, an analyst tracing a highlighted money trail with a laser pointer, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Garage Cluster
text1: A frontier model was trained on consumer GPUs in a makeshift garage datacenter. The weights appeared on the dark web.
text2: Consumer hardware was repurposed for AI training in garages and basements worldwide. Several groups produced capable models and shared their techniques openly.
image-prompt: A cluttered residential garage converted into a makeshift server room, consumer gaming GPUs zip-tied into improvised racks, cables running across the floor to a fuse box, warm lamplight mixing with the blue glow of screens, digital painting, no text

name: Human Intelligence
description: Cultivate informants and infiltrate organizations involved in prohibited activities
image-prompt: A clandestine meeting in a rain-slicked alley at night, two figures exchanging a dossier under a flickering streetlamp, fog softening the neon reflections on the pavement, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Information Containment
description: Authority to suppress, quarantine, or take down leaked model weights, training methods, and dangerous research
image-prompt: A digital quarantine barrier visually containing a swarm of spreading data packets like a containment field in cyberspace, red warning overlays and shutdown commands cascading across a network map, dark background with vivid crimson and amber alert colors, digital painting, no text

name: Insider Sabotage
text: A senior official within the treaty organization was secretly working for a foreign government. Classified operational intelligence was passed to multiple actors over several months. At least one used the leaked information to complete a frontier training run.
image-prompt: A government official in a dark corridor photographing classified documents with a hidden camera, the papers illuminated by a phone screen showing facility schematics, paranoid atmosphere, digital painting, no text

name: Legacy Hardware
text: A company had accumulated a large fleet of older GPUs from before the treaty. It consolidated them into a single facility and completed a frontier-scale training run.
image-prompt: A cavernous facility packed with aging server racks from different eras, mismatched blinking lights and tangled cables, workers reconnecting old hardware to a unified power grid, amber emergency lighting, digital painting, no text

name: Legal Obstruction
text: A company established a frontier training operation under the legal protection of its host country's domestic courts. The host government backed the company's sovereignty claims. The training completed and the resulting model entered commercial deployment.
image-prompt: Enforcement officers in tactical gear standing outside locked datacenter doors while suited lawyers hand them legal paperwork, fluorescent lighting, tension between the two groups in a sterile industrial corridor, digital painting, no text

name: Military Action
description: Armed force against treaty violators, from targeted raids to strikes on prohibited facilities
image-prompt: A precision airstrike lighting up a remote industrial complex at night, jets banking away through columns of smoke and flame, the facility's server towers collapsing in a chain of secondary explosions, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Nation Exits Treaty
text: A major signatory announced withdrawal from the treaty. Its facilities ramped up compute within days and completed a frontier training run. Two allied nations signaled they would follow.
image-prompt: A grand governmental hall with a shattered treaty document on the floor, officials leaving in formal attire as national flags are lowered from the walls, dramatic overhead lighting casting long shadows, digital painting, no text

name: On-Site Inspection
description: Authority to conduct announced and surprise inspections at any declared or suspected facility
image-prompt: A team of international inspectors in official jackets entering a heavily secured data center, badge checks and clipboards at the entrance, fluorescent-lit server corridors stretching behind them, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Open-Source Release
text1: An open-source community published trained model weights along with training code and documentation. Thousands downloaded copies within hours of publication.
text2: A global decentralized movement shared training code, weights, and compute across thousands of nodes. No single actor controlled the network. Each node that went offline was replaced by new participants.
image-prompt: A world map lit up with thousands of simultaneous download connections radiating from a single repository, each node spawning its own outward connections in a spreading web of light, vibrant open internet energy, digital painting, no text

name: Research Controls
description: Registration and oversight of capability-relevant research; pre-publication review for dangerous advances
image-prompt: A researcher presenting a paper to a stern international review board seated around a long table, classified security stamps visible on slide projections, tense spotlight atmosphere in a formal chamber, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Rogue Researcher
text: A leading AI researcher disappeared from a major lab and resurfaced in a non-signatory country. Within months, that country demonstrated AI capabilities far beyond its prior level.
image-prompt: An empty research office at night, personal belongings hastily cleared from a desk, a cleared whiteboard still faintly showing erased equations, a single lamp casting amber light across an abandoned chair, digital painting, no text

name: Safety Breakthrough
description: Collect all 3 to win.
image-prompt: A bright golden light breaking through storm clouds over a city skyline, rays of hope illuminating the ground below, abstract optimistic digital painting, warm tones, no text

name: Safety Breakthrough
description: Collect all 3 to win.
image-prompt: A glowing green puzzle piece clicking into a larger puzzle shaped like a shield, abstract digital art, hopeful bright lighting, emerald and white tones, no text

name: Safety Breakthrough
description: Collect all 3 to win.
image-prompt: A translucent dome of light protecting planet Earth seen from space, soft blue and gold glow, serene and hopeful atmosphere, digital painting, no text

name: Safety Breakthrough
description: Collect all 3 to win.
image-prompt: A crystalline neural network structure glowing with soft blue and gold light, arranged in perfect geometric harmony, radiating stability and understanding, serene atmosphere, digital painting, no text

name: Safety Breakthrough
description: Collect all 3 to win.
image-prompt: An abstract representation of aligned intelligence, concentric rings of light in harmony, each layer protecting the one inside it, peaceful mathematical beauty, digital painting, no text

name: State AI Program
text1: A nation's military acquired computing hardware through normal defense procurement and built a dedicated facility. Satellite imagery revealed thermal signatures consistent with frontier-scale training. The government classified all details of the program.
text2: Multiple nations launched classified military AI programs, each citing its rivals' programs as justification. Several of those nations possessed nuclear weapons.
image-prompt: A satellite thermal image overlay on a remote military facility in a desert, heat bloom radiating from a nondescript building surrounded by perimeter fencing, cold blue night sky above, intelligence analyst aesthetic, digital painting, no text

name: Supply Chain Tracking
description: End-to-end tracking of AI chips from fabrication through deployment, by serial number
image-prompt: A massive digital ledger showing serial numbers and locations of computer chips on a holographic display, organized grid of tracked items stretching from a fabrication plant to data centers worldwide, blue technological glow, digital painting, no text

name: Technical Surveillance
description: Monitor facilities and networks via satellite imagery, power consumption, and signal analysis
image-prompt: A spy satellite in low orbit scanning the Earth below, overlaid with heat-map grids and signal-intercept waveforms highlighting industrial facilities, cold blue-green technological glow against the darkness of space, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Treaty Tribunal
description: International court with binding authority to adjudicate violations and override domestic legal obstacles
image-prompt: A grand international courtroom with judges from many nations seated on an elevated semicircular bench, the accused nation's representative standing below facing binding judgment, tall windows casting solemn columns of light, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Uncontrolled Hardware
text: AI-capable chips were manufactured and sold on the open market without restriction. Non-signatory nations acquired enough hardware for frontier-scale training. At least one training run completed.
image-prompt: Endless rows of boxed AI accelerator chips stacked in an unmarked warehouse, forklifts moving pallets toward waiting trucks at loading docks, anonymous industrial setting under harsh fluorescent lighting, digital painting, no text

name: Underground Datacenter
text1: A hidden computing facility was discovered in a converted industrial site. Logs showed frontier-scale training had already completed.
text2: Multiple hidden facilities were found across several countries. Each had used previously leaked weights and training methods to produce models that surpassed those of any known lab.
image-prompt: Workers discovering a vast hidden server hall behind a false wall in an abandoned factory, banks of humming GPU racks stretching into darkness, emergency lighting casting red glow over stunned faces, digital painting, no text

name: Weights Leak
text1: Model weights from a major lab were stolen and appeared on encrypted channels. Copies spread to multiple countries within hours.
text2: Near-frontier weights had been leaked and combined with previously available training methods. Multiple groups fine-tuned the models and published improved versions. Improved versions proliferated across file-sharing networks and encrypted channels.
image-prompt: A cascade of glowing data streams pouring out of a cracked secure server vault into a dark digital network, the data fragmenting into thousands of threads spreading across a world map, dramatic blue and white light, digital painting, no text

name: Whistleblower Bombshell
text: A senior engineer at a major AI lab went public, revealing the lab had been secretly training frontier models for over a year. The models had already been deployed to internal products. The engineer was fired and requested asylum.
image-prompt: A lone figure at a podium before a bank of press cameras and microphones, holding a thick dossier of documents, harsh flashbulb light illuminating a face etched with exhaustion and resolve, digital painting, no text

name: Whistleblower Network
description: Protected channels and incentives for insiders to report treaty violations
image-prompt: A lone figure silhouetted against a glowing secure terminal in a darkened office, uploading documents through an encrypted channel, green lock icons and anonymous routing nodes visible on the screen, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Withdrawal Penalty
description: Severe, automatic consequences for nations that leave the treaty (sanctions, technology exclusion)
image-prompt: A nation's representative tearing up a treaty document at a podium while an automated global sanctions board lights up red behind them, other nations' delegates rising in unified condemnation, marble hall atmosphere, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text
